Video.summary: A phony newspaper item sparks a gold rush.
Video.title: Gold Lake

Video.summary: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine.
Video.title: The Talking Wire

Video.summary: The son of a Native chief faces trial after being accused of the murder of a fellow tribesman.
Video.title: Tribal Justice

Video.summary: When artistic Billy Jackson is threatened by gunslinger Corbett, he shoots him in the back.
Video.title: The Reluctant Gun

Video.summary: A couple face opposition to their marriage, the governor of California.
Video.title: Forbidden Wedding

Video.summary: A woman refuses to give her oxen to General Sam Houston for use in the war against Mexico.
Video.title: Pamela's Oxen

Video.summary: A teacher steps in when an outlaw influences a youngster.
Video.title: Learnin' at Dirty Devil

Video.summary: A Union officer attempts to thwart Southern patriot Belle Waverly's schemes.
Video.title: The Yankee Confederate

Video.summary: Dr. Allen Camden investigates the murder of likeable shopkeeper Grant Noble.
Video.title: Dead Man's Tale

Video.summary: A female patriot meets an outlaw.
Video.title: General Without a Cause

Video.summary: Trappers look for an escape when they're imprisoned by the Mexican governor of San Diego.
Video.title: Price of a Passport

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: Montana's corrupt governor tries to reform his image.
Video.title: The General Who Disappeared

Video.summary: An ex-con tries to prevent the son he gave up for adoption from following in his steps.
Video.title: The Young Gun

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.
Video.title: A Friend Indeed

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: An Irish miner hopes a man named Ben will help him find gold after Ben demonstrates magical powers.
Video.title: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Image.alt: The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch
The Leprechaun of Last Chance Gulch

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: Sandy King, the youngest member of an outlaw gang, is wounded.
Video.title: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Image.alt: A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule
A Mule... Like the Army's Mule

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: A Mormon leader is determined to enforce God's law with a gun.
Video.title: Son of Thunder

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: Maso and Okei, tea growers in Gold Hills, encounter both friendship and racism from the locals.
Video.title: The Dragon of Gold Hill

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: There's more than gold in store for prim Wilhelmina Vail when she tackles a claim in Utah territory.
Video.title: Talk to Me, Charley

Video.summary: Father de la Cuesta is curious why a deceased padre ordered a hand organ for the mission.
Video.title: A Gift from Father Tapis

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: A land manager tries to outfox two women attempting to rightfully claim their property.
Video.title: By the Book

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Rachel Barrett's act of kindness toward an injured Native leads to her family's capture.
Video.title: A Gift

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Image.alt: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt
The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull
